---
title: "Practice Activity 10: Communication"
filters:
  - versions
versions:
  - student:
      out-dir: ".."
      yaml:
        author: "Your Name"
        embed-resources: true
  - instructions:
      out-dir: ".."
      yaml:
        eval: false
  - solution:
      out-dir: ".."
      out-file: "pa10-solution.qmd"
      yaml:
        author: "SOLUTIONS"
        embed-resources: true
format: 
  html:
    code-tools: true
    toc: true      
execute: 
  error: true
  echo: true
  message: false
  warning: false
---

# Setup

:::callout-tip
# Canvas Submission
xxx
:::
